title: Total Knee Replacement Medical Necessity Policy

criteria.description: Severe osteoarthritis documented
Conservative therapy failed for at least 3 months (12 weeks)
Imaging confirms advanced joint degeneration

policy_text: Total knee replacement is medically necessary when severe osteoarthritis is documented, conservative therapy has failed for at least 3 months, and imaging confirms advanced joint degeneration.

title: Total Hip Replacement Medical Necessity Policy

criteria.description: Severe osteoarthritis of the hip documented
Conservative therapy failed for at least 3 months (12 weeks)
Imaging confirms advanced joint-space narrowing

policy_text: Total hip replacement is medically necessary when severe hip osteoarthritis is documented, conservative therapy has failed for at least 3 months, and imaging confirms advanced joint-space narrowing.

title: Rotator Cuff Repair Medical Necessity Policy

criteria.description: MRI confirms full or partial-thickness rotator cuff tear
Conservative therapy (PT/NSAIDs) failed for at least 6 weeks

policy_text: Rotator cuff repair is medically necessary when imaging confirms a tear and conservative therapy has failed for at least 6 weeks.

title: Lumbar Spinal Fusion Medical Necessity Policy

criteria.description: Severe or disabling low back/radicular pain documented
Conservative therapy failed for at least 6 months (24 weeks)
Imaging confirms structural pathology correlating with symptoms

policy_text: Lumbar spinal fusion is medically necessary when severe radicular symptoms are documented, conservative therapy has failed for at least 6 months, and imaging confirms correlating structural pathology.

title: ACL Reconstruction Medical Necessity Policy

criteria.description: MRI confirms ACL tear/rupture
Functional instability or failed conservative rehab documented

policy_text: ACL reconstruction is medically necessary when MRI confirms tear and functional instability persists despite at least 4 weeks of rehabilitation.

title: Meniscus Repair Medical Necessity Policy

criteria.description: MRI confirms meniscal tear
Conservative therapy failed for at least 4 weeks

policy_text: Meniscus repair is medically necessary when MRI confirms a meniscal tear and conservative therapy has failed for at least 4 weeks.

title: Percutaneous Coronary Intervention (Stent) Policy

criteria.description: Angiography confirms significant coronary stenosis
Symptomatic ischemia despite optimal medical therapy

policy_text: PCI is medically necessary when angiography confirms significant stenosis and the patient remains symptomatic despite optimal medical therapy.

title: Coronary Artery Bypass Graft Policy

criteria.description: Angiography confirms multivessel or left main disease
Optimal medical therapy attempted and insufficient

policy_text: CABG is medically necessary when angiography confirms multivessel or left main disease not amenable to PCI and medical therapy is insufficient.

title: Pacemaker Implantation Policy

criteria.description: Symptomatic bradyarrhythmia documented on ECG/monitor

policy_text: Pacemaker implantation is medically necessary when a symptomatic bradyarrhythmia is documented.

title: Catheter Ablation for Atrial Fibrillation Policy

criteria.description: Symptomatic atrial fibrillation documented
Failed at least one antiarrhythmic drug trial

policy_text: Catheter ablation is medically necessary for symptomatic atrial fibrillation refractory to at least one antiarrhythmic drug trial.

title: Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement Policy

criteria.description: Echocardiogram confirms severe aortic stenosis
Symptomatic per NYHA class or high surgical risk

policy_text: TAVR is medically necessary when echocardiography confirms severe aortic stenosis with symptoms or high surgical risk for open valve replacement.

title: Systemic Chemotherapy Authorization Policy

criteria.description: Pathology/biopsy confirms malignancy
Staging workup documented

policy_text: Systemic chemotherapy is medically necessary when biopsy confirms malignancy and disease staging is documented.

title: Radiation Therapy Authorization Policy

criteria.description: Pathology confirms malignancy in the target field
Case reviewed with defined treatment intent (curative/palliative)

policy_text: Radiation therapy is medically necessary when pathology confirms malignancy and a defined treatment intent is documented.

title: PET Scan Authorization Policy

criteria.description: Cancer diagnosis established or strongly suspected

policy_text: PET-CT is medically necessary for initial staging or suspected recurrence of an established or strongly suspected malignancy.

title: Targeted Therapy Authorization Policy

criteria.description: Biomarker/mutation testing confirms target
Prior standard therapy failed or is contraindicated

policy_text: Targeted therapy is medically necessary when biomarker testing confirms an actionable target and prior standard therapy failed or is contraindicated.

title: Disease-Modifying Therapy for Multiple Sclerosis Policy

criteria.description: MRI confirms demyelinating lesions consistent with MS
Relapsing or active disease course documented

policy_text: DMT is medically necessary when MRI confirms demyelinating lesions and a relapsing or active MS course is documented.

title: Epilepsy Surgery Evaluation Policy

criteria.description: Seizures refractory to at least two anti-epileptic drugs
EEG/MRI localizes seizure focus

policy_text: Epilepsy surgery evaluation is medically necessary when seizures are drug-resistant and imaging/EEG localizes a seizure focus.

title: CGRP Inhibitor for Chronic Migraine Policy

criteria.description: At least 15 headache days per month documented
Failed at least two preventive medication classes

policy_text: CGRP inhibitor therapy is medically necessary for chronic migraine after failure of at least two preventive medication classes.

title: Deep Brain Stimulation for Parkinson's Disease Policy

criteria.description: Motor fluctuations/dyskinesia despite optimized medication
Optimized medical therapy trialed for at least 6 months (24 weeks)

policy_text: DBS is medically necessary when motor fluctuations persist despite optimized medical therapy trialed for at least 6 months.

title: Biologic Therapy for Inflammatory Bowel Disease Policy

criteria.description: Endoscopy/colonoscopy confirms active disease
Failed conventional therapy (steroids/immunomodulators) for at least 8 weeks

policy_text: Biologic therapy is medically necessary when endoscopy confirms active IBD and conventional therapy has failed for at least 8 weeks.

title: Bariatric Surgery Medical Necessity Policy

criteria.description: BMI and comorbidity criteria documented
Physician-supervised weight management for at least 6 months (24 weeks)

policy_text: Bariatric surgery is medically necessary when BMI/comorbidity criteria are documented and supervised weight management for at least 6 months has failed.

title: ERCP Authorization Policy

criteria.description: Imaging confirms biliary/pancreatic duct obstruction

policy_text: ERCP is medically necessary when imaging confirms biliary or pancreatic duct obstruction.

title: Liver Transplant Evaluation Policy

criteria.description: Decompensated cirrhosis/end-stage liver disease documented
Imaging/labs confirm advanced liver disease

policy_text: Liver transplant evaluation is medically necessary for documented decompensated or end-stage liver disease confirmed by imaging/labs.

title: Enzyme Replacement Therapy for Gaucher Disease Policy

criteria.description: Genetic testing or enzyme assay confirms diagnosis
Symptomatic organomegaly, cytopenia, or bone disease documented

policy_text: Enzyme replacement therapy is medically necessary when enzyme assay/genetic testing confirms Gaucher disease with symptomatic manifestations.

title: Enzyme Replacement Therapy for Fabry Disease Policy

criteria.description: Genetic testing confirms GLA mutation
Symptomatic renal, cardiac, or neuropathic manifestations documented

policy_text: Enzyme replacement therapy is medically necessary when genetic testing confirms Fabry disease with symptomatic organ involvement.

title: Enzyme Replacement Therapy for Pompe Disease Policy

criteria.description: Genetic testing or enzyme assay confirms diagnosis
Muscle weakness or respiratory involvement documented

policy_text: Enzyme replacement therapy is medically necessary when testing confirms Pompe disease with muscle or respiratory involvement.

title: Assistive Communication/Mobility Device for ALS Policy

criteria.description: Neurology confirms ALS diagnosis via EMG/clinical criteria
Documented functional decline affecting speech or mobility

policy_text: Assistive devices are medically necessary when ALS diagnosis is confirmed and functional decline affecting speech or mobility is documented.

title: Antifibrotic Therapy for Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis Policy

criteria.description: High-resolution CT confirms usual interstitial pneumonia pattern
Other causes of interstitial lung disease excluded

policy_text: Antifibrotic therapy is medically necessary when HRCT confirms a UIP pattern and other causes of ILD have been excluded.

title: IVIG Therapy for Myasthenia Gravis Policy

criteria.description: Antibody testing or EMG confirms diagnosis
Refractory symptoms or myasthenic crisis documented

policy_text: IVIG therapy is medically necessary when myasthenia gravis is confirmed by antibody/EMG testing with refractory symptoms or crisis.

title: Chelation Therapy for Wilson's Disease Policy

criteria.description: Ceruloplasmin/24-hour urine copper or genetic testing confirms diagnosis
Hepatic or neurological involvement documented

policy_text: Chelation therapy is medically necessary when Wilson's disease is confirmed by copper studies/genetic testing with hepatic or neurologic involvement.

title: Extended Physical Therapy Authorization Policy

criteria.description: Functional deficit documented by treating clinician

policy_text: Extended physical therapy is medically necessary when a functional deficit is documented by the treating clinician.

title: Knee Brace Durable Medical Equipment Policy

criteria.description: Joint instability or offloading need documented

policy_text: A knee brace is medically necessary when joint instability or an offloading need is documented.
